name: nightcity
voice: broken-UI hardware register meets the cover mark — body words BOOT in as corrupted cyan for a frame before settling to acid-yellow UI (minors keep a cyan/red registration shadow); the apex word slams in BEHIND the subject SET IN the replica typeface of the CP2077 cover lettering (real brush chops, blade terminals, spikes in the glyphs; logo case), with the cyan duplicate offset, a baseline streak merged into the glyph feet, cyan debris and a circuit trace off the tail. Tear-in slices, living print, tear-out.
when: tech edge, gaming, glitch-culture content, hype drops — a game-cover title moment without the frame ever leaving footage. Loud register.
